mnemonics.title: PDF vs PMF
mnemonics.content: PDF is for Continuous (Density), PMF for Discrete (Mass) - CD

mnemonics.title: Normal Parameters
mnemonics.content: N(μ, σ²): Mean μ is Where, σ is Spread

acronyms.usage: Describes relative likelihood for continuous variables

visualTips.visualization: Bell curve: peak at μ, symmetry, 68-95-99.7% areas
J-shaped curve starting at λ, decaying exponentially

analogies.analogy: Like a smooth mountain range - height shows density, area gives probability
Like filling a glass with water - total volume up to mark x is F(x)
